response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Handled both the conversational segment (00:00 - 02:10) and the song 'Draw.' (02:10 - 04:59). Handled the Japanese/English mix flawlessly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the spoken talk segment manually using the native audio fallback hierarchy. Verified song lyrics against on-screen presentation and reference guidelines.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are perfectly synchronized, using exact start times for spoken dialogue and precise timing transitions to prevent cascading delays. Added prominent title/credits as a silent visual event at 02:10.

subtitles.original: Cheki-style photo with handwritten message sign.
subtitles.english: An instant photo-style card with a handwritten message sign.

subtitles.original: サイン、サイン！
subtitles.english: Sign, sign!

subtitles.original: こちらは直筆サイン入りのチェキ風ブロマイドカードがフルセットに付いてきます！
subtitles.english: This comes with an autographed instant photo-style card in the full set!

subtitles.original: わぁー！すごい！
subtitles.english: Wow! Amazing!

subtitles.original: And cheki-style bro- bromide... English 難しい...
subtitles.english: And instant photo-style bro- bromide... English is hard...

subtitles.original: English 難しかった？ Difficult English!
subtitles.english: Was English hard? Difficult English!

subtitles.original: With foil-stamped repro-reproduction... I can't... I can't talk anymore! Signature! Woah!
subtitles.english: With foil-stamped repro-reproduction... I can't... I can't talk anymore! Signature! Woah!

subtitles.original: ちなみにサインは数量限定となっております！
subtitles.english: By the way, the autographed ones are limited in quantity!

subtitles.original: はい！お願いします。 お願いします！
subtitles.english: Yes! Please check it out. Please do!

subtitles.original: Here's the full set again, so please go check it out, everyone! Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Here's the full set again, so please go check it out, everyone! Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: And that was the merch line-up for Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!
subtitles.english: And that was the merch line-up for Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai, thank you so much for your support! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai, thank you so much for your support! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: いやいやいや、こちらこそ！上手にフォローできてたかな？できてたかな？
subtitles.english: No, no, thank you as well! Were we able to support you well? I wonder if we did.

subtitles.original: Thank you! でもすっごく楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: Thank you! But it was so much fun!

subtitles.original: 楽しかった！ So happy! 楽しかった、ありがとう、嬉しい！
subtitles.english: It was fun! So happy! It was fun, thank you, I'm so glad!

subtitles.original: Alright, now that the merch announcement is done, the next song will be the last one, 最後。
subtitles.english: Alright, now that the merch announcement is done, the next song will be the last one.

subtitles.original: え？ Last song? Last song! 楽しみ！
subtitles.english: Eh? Last song? Last song! Looking forward to it!

subtitles.original: Hmm, I'm kind of nervous... Please cheer for me, okay, Senpais?
subtitles.english: Hmm, I'm kind of nervous... Please cheer for me, okay, Senpais?

subtitles.original: おーけー、おーけー！ がんばれがんばれ、ラオラ！ファイト、ファイト！ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Okay, okay! Do your best, Raora! Fight, fight! Thank you!

subtitles.original: じゃ、bye-bye? Let's say goodbye? おーけー、おーけー！ Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Well then, bye-bye? Let's say goodbye? Okay, okay! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Draw. / 作詞・編曲：Orcaにゃん
subtitles.english: Draw. / Lyrics & Music Arrangement: Orca-nyan

subtitles.original: 夢のぬくもりと
subtitles.english: Warmth of a dream

subtitles.original: 指先に絵の具の匂い
subtitles.english: And the scent of paint on my fingertips

subtitles.original: 湿ったキャンバスの上には
subtitles.english: On the damp canvas

subtitles.original: まだ知らない色が息をする
subtitles.english: Colors I don't know yet are breathing

subtitles.original: All the pieces I picked up
subtitles.english: All the pieces I picked up

subtitles.original: Unravel in my own chest
subtitles.english: Unravel in my own chest

subtitles.original: “It's okay,” I whisper softly
subtitles.english: “It's okay,” I whisper softly

subtitles.original: Saying it back to myself
subtitles.english: Saying it back to myself

subtitles.original: 迷いも 震えも
subtitles.english: My hesitation or my trembling

subtitles.original: 隠さなくていいから
subtitles.english: I don't need to hide

subtitles.original: この線の全部が
subtitles.english: All of these lines

subtitles.original: 私へ続く
subtitles.english: Lead to me

subtitles.original: I'm drawing out my true colors
subtitles.english: I'm drawing out my true colors

subtitles.original: 滲んだ輪郭も
subtitles.english: The blurred outlines too

subtitles.original: 淡く、脆く、煌めいて
subtitles.english: Faintly, fragilely, sparkling

subtitles.original: 形になってゆくの
subtitles.english: They become a form

subtitles.original: 夜明けの面影に 集めた色を重ね
subtitles.english: In the shadow of the dawn, I layer the colors I gathered

subtitles.original: Draw it slow, draw it true
subtitles.english: Draw it slow, draw it true

subtitles.original: 夜明けの夢現
subtitles.english: Dawn's dream-reality

subtitles.original: 微睡に余白の答え
subtitles.english: An answer in the margins of a doze

subtitles.original: 白いページに色が咲いていく
subtitles.english: Colors bloom on the white page

subtitles.original: 息づいた景色を描き出す
subtitles.english: Drawing out the scenery that has come to life

subtitles.original: All the colors I held back
subtitles.english: All the colors I held back

subtitles.original: Start to gather in the hush
subtitles.english: Start to gather in the hush

subtitles.original: “It's all right,” the first light tells me
subtitles.english: “It's all right,” the first light tells me

subtitles.original: Sending warmth into my heart
subtitles.english: Sending warmth into my heart

subtitles.original: 願いも希望も 隠さなくていいんだよ
subtitles.english: I don't need to hide my wishes or my hopes

subtitles.original: ほら、ありのままの 私を描く
subtitles.english: Look, I am drawing myself as I am
